mnemonics.title: WAIT
mnemonics.content: Wait Always Inside while loop To avoid spurious wakeups

mnemonics.title: NOTIFY
mnemonics.content: Notify One Thread, Informing You to re-acquire lock

mnemonics.title: SUNRISE
mnemonics.content: Synchronized Unlocks Nobody (wait), Releases Immediately (notify), Signals Everybody (notifyAll)
